title: Some O' TM - Modrinth Edition
description: SomeO'TheMods offers a blend of technology, magic, and exploration mods to enhance your Minecraft experience. Dive into the world of automation with mods like Advanced Peripherals, AE2, and Create. Discover the magic of Ars Nouveau and Apotheosis.
body:
SomeO'TheMods offers a blend of technology, magic, and exploration mods to enhance your Minecraft experience. Dive into the world of automation with mods like Advanced Peripherals, AE2, and Create. Discover the magic of Ars Nouveau and Apotheosis. Embark on new adventures with Alex's Mobs, Minecolonies, and Mowzie's Mobs.

Key Features:

Technology: Automate your world with Advanced Peripherals, AE2, and Create. Experience the power of Draconic Evolution and Bigger Reactors.
Magic: Harness magical abilities with Ars Nouveau and Apotheosis. Explore mystical agriculture and brew potent potions with Farmers Delight.
Exploration: Discover new creatures with Alex's Mobs and Mowzie's Mobs. Build thriving colonies with Minecolonies.
Building: Enhance your builds with Chisels and Bits, Decorative Blocks, and Macaw's Bridges and Lights.
Quality of Life: Enjoy improved game mechanics with Mouse Tweaks, Inventory Sorter, and Waystones.
Whether you're a tech enthusiast, a magic lover, or an explorer at heart, SomeO'TheMods has something for everyone. Jump in and start your adventure today!

Now with Create 6.0+

Feel free to join our Discord server for a community of people to play with, and to help us develop the modpack!
https://discord.gg/pz7QyazUQS

Cosmetic Armor Reworked- https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked

Quark Programmer Art - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark

Aquaculture 2 - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture

Time In A Bottle - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/time-in-a-bottle-universal
